items.title: Trump says US to pause operation to guide vessels through Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: "Project Freedom", which began less than 48 hours ago, will be halted because progress has been made toward a deal with Iran, the US president says.

items.title: Hantavirus may have spread between passengers on cruise ship, WHO says
items.summary: Two cases of the virus, which rarely spreads between humans, have been confirmed on the ship, and three people have died.

items.title: Vivek Ramaswamy wins Republican nomination for Ohio governor
items.summary: He spent much of the race criticising the state's response to the Covid-19 pandemic led by the Democrat nominee.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美軍護航首日擊沉7艘伊朗快艇！ 葉耀元提3點觀察
items.summary: 美軍啟動護航首日爆發實彈衝突，於荷姆茲海峽擊沉7艘伊朗快艇，美國國務卿魯比歐5日表示，針對伊朗的首輪大規模軍事行動「史詩怒火」（Operation Epic Fury）已經結束。...…

items.title: 日本香川縣車站旅客誤觸防熊噴霧 月台8人眼睛刺痛
items.summary: 日本近來熊出沒事件頻傳，參與戶外活動的民眾往往都會攜帶防熊噴霧，但香川縣JR多度津車站月台5日晚間6時35分許發生意外，有1名旅客誤觸噴霧導致8人眼睛、嘴巴刺痛。  綜合日媒...…

items.title: 因應伊朗戰爭衝擊 英國零售業籲政府行動
items.summary: 英國零售業6日呼籲政府採取行動，以因應受中東戰火影響而飆升的成本，並警告若沒有政府的支持，將更難控制不斷上漲的物價，最終影響消費者。  根據《路透》報導，英國零售商協會（B...…
